APP_TOKEN.description: Pairing token generated by the native Mac app. Open the app, copy the generated token, and paste it here.

MAILBOX_ADDRESS.description: The single mailbox address this Worker serves, e.g. `hello@yourdomain.com`. Must match the Email Routing rule you create for this Worker.

MAILBOX_DISPLAY_NAME.description: Display name used as the outbound sender, e.g. `Jane Doe`.
